meaning: adj.强烈的,精深的,透彻的,[语法]加强语气的n.加强器
examples: Ahead of us lay ten days of intensive training.
Intensive cultivation has impoverished the soil.
As costs fall, local governments will find more intensive monitoring to be easily affordable.
Some travellers would receive intensive levels of checks, such as hands-on pat-downs, while others would speed through.
